name: Apricot Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the dried apricots through a food grinder to crush them finely.
2. Combine the crushed apricots with condensed milk and coconut in a bowl.
3. Shape the mixture into small balls.
4. Roll the balls in fruit sugar or toasted chopped almonds for added texture (optional).
NOTES: Mom always made these, and I have made them for 25 years. They are really good but can be sticky to make.
